overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cyberpunk-style video game showing a character walking down a rain-soaked city street at night. The character holds a glowing purple umbrella that illuminates the wet pavement and surroundings. The scene features neon-lit buildings, street lamps, and occasional pedestrians passing by.

scene_state.functional_zone: rainy urban sidewalk with neon-lit storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the wet sidewalk holding a glowing purple umbrella, with rain visibly falling

notable_agents.action: woman in white top and dark skirt walking in opposite direction, passing by the ego at close distance

entered.detail: green metal safety railings separating the sidewalk from the street
rain-soaked concrete sidewalk reflecting purple and blue neon lights
tall modern building with illuminated windows and vertical neon signage
tall street lamp casting warm light onto the wet ground
traffic signal showing red light visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk at night, holding a glowing purple umbrella. Metal railings line the right side separating the walkway from the street, while neon-lit buildings rise on the left. A pedestrian in white passes by on the right, and the wet pavement reflects the colorful artificial lighting.

events.description: pedestrian on the left reaches out their arm toward the ego as they pass each other

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk down the sidewalk, maintaining a steady pace through the rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with dark hair extending their arm outward as they pass by on the left side

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking along the wet sidewalk, passing more pedestrians in the rainy night. A pedestrian on the left reaches out as they pass by. The metal railings continue along the right, and the building facade on the left moves closer as the character progresses toward the intersection ahead.

events.description: stepping onto the painted crosswalk lines as the character approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking toward and entering the crosswalk to cross the street, still holding the glowing umbrella

entered.detail: white painted zebra stripes marking the pedestrian crossing on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the intersection and steps onto the painted crosswalk lines. The metal railings on the right draw closer as the sidewalk narrows. The crosswalk stripes become prominent underfoot, and the open intersection ahead reveals more of the rainy street and distant traffic lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a rain-soaked urban sidewalk that gradually leads toward a wide city intersection. It begins with the character walking past neon-lit buildings and metal railings, their glowing purple umbrella casting reflections across the wet pavement as a pedestrian in white passes by. As the character progresses, the scene shifts to include more pedestrians, including one on the left who reaches out, while the building facades draw closer. The camera then follows the character as they approach the edge of the walkway, where the metal railings narrow and the sidewalk gives way to the painted stripes of a crosswalk. Finally, the view opens up across the intersection, revealing the expanse of the rainy street and distant traffic lights.
